description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Woof that runs on push and pull request events to the master branch. The workflow has two jobs: build and cppcheck, both running on ubuntu-18.04. The build job uses a matrix strategy to compile with clang and gcc, installing dependencies, checking out the code, and running a make command with the specified compiler. The cppcheck job installs cppcheck, checks out the code, and runs cppcheck analysis.
